title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide, oil jumps on renewed U.S.-Iran war risks
summary: Bitcoin traded at $74,335 after Iran reimposed controls on the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, with the modest 1.6% pullback standing out against a 5.7% jump in Brent and a 1.2% drop in European equity futures.
